entry.title: New IDC 36C79119D0007 awarded to SIGNATURE CHOICE LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NON-VA COMMUNITY HEALTHCARE CLAIMS PROCESSING&PROVIDER CUSTOMER SERVICE CONTACT CENTER IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATION OF INSURANCE AND PENSION FUNDS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

ns1:typeOfSetAside.description: SERVICE DISABLED VETERAN OWNED SMALL BUSINESS SET-ASIDE
